title: clusia triflora
intro: Clusia triflora, also known as the Yellow Currant or Currant Tree, is a species of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Clusia triflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
